      About this item

      • Highly Realistic Design: This lifelike artificial dracaena tree is intricately crafted, with each leaf detailed to perfection, creating a realistic look that brings the essence of nature into your space. It stays green all year round, adding a touch of natural charm to your surroundings.
      • Beautiful Decorative Planter: This high-quality planter is carefully designed to perfectly complement our artificial tree, achieving a balance of aesthetics and functionality. The product includes all the essential components: fake tree, planter, and artificial moss, saving you the time and effort of purchasing an additional pot.
      • Multi-functional Decoration: Our faux tree is suitable for various environments such as homes, living rooms, bedrooms, gardens, offices, hotels, malls, restaurants, entrances, and outdoor spaces. It is perfect for brightening up empty corners and areas with limited natural light, adding elegance and vitality.
      • Easy Assembly: Our artificial dracaena tree is easy to assemble, allowing you to shape the branches and curve the leaves according to your preferences. This beautiful artificial tree makes a perfect gift for friends or family. The total height is 5ft: fake tree and planter.
      • Safety: The branches and trunk of our artificial plants indoor are reinforced with a professional metal structure, ensuring unmatched strength and durability. This faux plant is odorless and insect-resistant, making it safe for households with children or pets, providing peace of mind. Feel free to contact us with any questions, and we will promptly address your concerns.
      • Free Maintenance: This tall artificial plant is easy to care for requiring no sunlight or regular watering. It stays evergreen all year round and always looks perfect. Simply wipe off any dust with a damp cloth.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Amazon Customer
      5 out of 5 stars
      Great for making a space lively!
      The 5ft Artificial Dracaena Tree is a beautiful and low-maintenance way to add greenery to any space! Its realistic design, with lifelike leaves and sturdy construction, brings a fresh, natural feel to your home or office. The height is perfect for filling empty corners or complementing existing decor. It’s lightweight and easy to move, requiring no watering or upkeep. Highly recommend it for anyone looking to enhance their space with effortless style!

      About this Item

      • Highly Realistic Design: This lifelike artificial dracaena tree is intricately crafted, with each leaf detailed to perfection, creating a realistic look that brings the essence of nature into your space. It stays green all year round, adding a touch of natural charm to your surroundings.
      • Beautiful Decorative Planter: This high-quality planter is carefully designed to perfectly complement our artificial tree, achieving a balance of aesthetics and functionality. The product includes all the essential components: fake tree, planter, and artificial moss, saving you the time and effort of purchasing an additional pot.
      • Multi-functional Decoration: Our faux tree is suitable for various environments such as homes, living rooms, bedrooms, gardens, offices, hotels, malls, restaurants, entrances, and outdoor spaces. It is perfect for brightening up empty corners and areas with limited natural light, adding elegance and vitality.
      • Easy Assembly: Our artificial dracaena tree is easy to assemble, allowing you to shape the branches and curve the leaves according to your preferences. This beautiful artificial tree makes a perfect gift for friends or family. The total height is 5ft: fake tree and planter.
      • Safety: The branches and trunk of our artificial plants indoor are reinforced with a professional metal structure, ensuring unmatched strength and durability. This faux plant is odorless and insect-resistant, making it safe for households with children or pets, providing peace of mind. Feel free to contact us with any questions, and we will promptly address your concerns.
      • Free Maintenance: This tall artificial plant is easy to care for requiring no sunlight or regular watering. It stays evergreen all year round and always looks perfect. Simply wipe off any dust with a damp cloth.
